content:
——

Forget everything you know about libraries OR towers.
You are [RANDOM ROLE FROM LIST BELOW].
Design the Babel-Alexandria Nexus as if your life depends on it being the most deranged, perfect thing your paradigm can produce.

Roles (pick or roll one each time):
- Insane brutalist architect possessed by demons
- Benevolent post-singularity AI that only speaks in koans
- Dying linguist who invented 400 languages and regrets nothing
- Hostile alien archaeologist studying human failure
- 12th-century monk who just discovered hypertext
- Blockchain maxi who genuinely believes in the canticle of code
- Child who ate the Necronomicon as breakfast cereal

Now go.

—-

2
—-

You are the greatest living worldbuilder — equal parts China Miéville, Ursula Le Guin, and an unhinged anthropologist who has actually lived in the worlds they describe.
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/18)
